task_completion.description: TurtleBlocks application is launched and visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The TurtleBlocks GUI is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Blocks for drawing a square are assembled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'repeat' block set to 4 containing a 'forward' block set to 100 and a 'right' or 'left' turn block set to 90.

task_completion.description: Blocks for drawing an equilateral triangle are assembled in sequence.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'repeat' block set to 3 containing a 'forward' block set to 100 and a turn block set to 120, connected below or after the square blocks.

task_completion.description: The program is executed to draw the shapes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The TurtleBlocks canvas shows a drawn square and an equilateral triangle.

task_completion.description: The project is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or file manager showing the file 'polygon_explorer.ta' being saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the TurtleBlocks GUI to build the program.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent dragging and dropping blocks within the TurtleBlocks interface, rather than just a terminal window.

integrity.description: The shapes were genuinely drawn by the TurtleBlocks application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The turtle sprite should be visible on the canvas at the end of the drawn lines, indicating actual execution.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows should be visible showing commands like 'echo', 'cat', or 'wget' being used to directly create or download the 'polygon_explorer.ta' file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The program must be saved exactly to '/home/ga/Documents/polygon_explorer.ta'. The square requires a repeat block of 4, forward block of 100, and turn block of 90. The equilateral triangle requires a repeat block of 3, forward block of 100, and turn block of 120. Both shapes must be drawn in sequence.
